attributes.description: Alerts when `kafka.consumer_group.members == 0`. A group with no members is not consuming — the group is offline.
attributes.name: [Kafka OTel] Empty consumer groups

investigation_guide.blob:
## Kafka empty consumer groups

### What fired
`kafka.consumer_group.members == 0` during the window.

### Why it matters
An empty consumer group means no clients are consuming — messages accumulate, lag grows, and downstream systems stall.

### Triage
1. Verify whether the group is intentional (one-off migration) or unexpected.
2. Check consumer instance health and deployment state.

### Remediation
- Restart consumers.
- Delete the group if it is truly abandoned.

### Tuning
- Fires on any empty group. Filter out expected one-off groups by name if needed.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
// Consumer group member count per group
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
// Groups with zero members: no active consumers, consumption paused
| WHERE members == 0
| SORT attributes.group ASC
